def solve(words : Array(String)) : Array(Int64)

    n = words.size

    if n == 0

        return []

    end

    if n == 1

        return [0]

    end

    # precompute pre array

    pre = Array.new(n-1) { 0 }

    for j in 0..n-2

        pre[j] = common_prefix(words[j], words[j+1])

    end

    # precompute prefix_max

    prefix_max = Array.new(n-1) { 0 }

    prefix_max[0] = pre[0]

    for i in 1..n-2

        prefix_max[i] = [prefix_max[i-1], pre[i]].max

    end

    # precompute suffix_max

    suffix_max = Array.new(n-1) { 0 }

    suffix_max[n-2] = pre[n-2]

    for i in (n-3).downto(0)

        suffix_max[i] = [pre[i], suffix_max[i+1]].max

    end

    answer = Array.new(n) { 0 }

    for i in 0..n-1

        if (n-1) < 2

            answer[i] = 0

        else

            if i == 0

                left_part = 0

                if i+1 <= n-2

                    right_part = suffix_max[i+1]

                else

                    right_part = 0

                end

            elsif i == n-1

                if n-3 >= 0

                    left_part = prefix_max[n-3]

                else

                    left_part = 0

                end

                right_part = 0

            else

                left_part = if i-2 >= 0 then prefix_max[i-2] else 0 end

                right_part = if i+1 <= n-2 then suffix_max[i+1] else 0 end

            end

            original_max = [left_part, right_part].max

            if i == 0 || i == n-1

                new_pair = 0

            else

                new_pair = common_prefix(words[i-1], words[i+1])

            end

            answer[i] = [original_max, new_pair].max

        end

    end

    return answer

end
